_Edité le_26 novembre 2025_FRAIS DE DEPLACEMENT-HEBERGEMENT DU PERSONNEL NAVIGANT EP4_Nom_BOUCHER_Prénom_HELENE_Matricule_EQTL1_Affectation_30000076_Classe_CDG_3_Base_Spécialité_OPL_Fonction_Mois_Echelon_OCTOBRE   2025_Libellé_OPL 100%_02_Avion_Ventilation_Transport_Départ_Arrivée_Montant_PN_Exonéré_km_Horaires locaux_SAB_MF_Horaires locaux_PN Non_Exonéré_Pdéj_Dec_Total Indem_Esc_Pdéj_MF_IR_Mt Dec_Esc_IR_ Dec_N°_Ligne_Type_01 | 09:30_SST_CDG_VST_01 | 07:30_01 | 10:45_SST_CDG_VJD_01 | 10:00_01 | 12:15_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_01 | 10:45_02 | 09:30_SST_CDG_VST_02 | 07:30_02 | 10:45_SST_CDG_VJD_02 | 10:00_02 | 13:45_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_02 | 10:45_03 | 09:30_SST_CDG_VST_03 | 07:30_03 | 10:45_SST_CDG_VJD_03 | 10:00_03 | 12:15_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_03 | 10:45_06 | 12:15_SST_CDG_VJD_06 | 08:15_66_06 | 17:00_SST_CDG_VJD_06 | 14:00_G6_07 | 13:00_SST_CDG_VST_07 | 11:00_07 | 14:15_SST_CDG_VJD_07 | 13:30_07 | 16:15_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_07 | 14:15_08 | 13:00_SST_CDG_VST_08 | 11:00_08 | 14:15_SST_CDG_VJD_08 | 13:30_08 | 15:45_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_08 | 14:15_08 | 16:15_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_08 | 15:45_08 | 16:45_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_08 | 16:15_09 | 12:00_SST_CDG_VTD_09 | 10:00_09 | 13:30_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_09 | 12:30_09 | 14:30_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_09 | 13:30_09 | 15:30_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_09 | 14:30_10 | 12:00_SST_CDG_VTD_10 | 10:00_10 | 13:30_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_10 | 12:30_13 | 12:00_SST_CDG_VJD_13 | 10:00_13 | 12:30_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_13 | 12:00_13 | 12:50_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_13 | 12:30_13 | 13:20_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_13 | 12:50_13 | 13:35_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_13 | 13:20_13 | 14:00_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_13 | 13:35_13 | 14:25_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_13 | 14:00_13 | 14:40_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_13 | 14:25_13 | 14:55_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_13 | 14:40_66_14 | 18:00_SST_CDG_VFE_14 | 14:00_G6_66_15 | 14:00_SST_CDG_VFE_15 | 10:00_G6_18 | 11:00_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_18 | 09:00_18 | 15:00_SST_Hors-Base_VAO_18 | 11:00_66_19 | 22:00_SST_CDG_VFE_19 | 18:00_G6_<2025103000007600000000>_6 | 13175
